titleStmt.title: SII 30.117: original edition by N. Marxia Gandhi, A. Padmavathy and S. Swaminathan
No. 117. (A.R. No. 195 of 1915.) Brahmadēsam, Cheyyar Taluk, North Arcot District Chandramauḷīśvara temple-on the north wall Pārthivēndravarmaṉ: year 2: 961 A.D.

summary.p: This inscription records that all the lands belonging to the temple were made tax-free by the village assembly añjaṣhṭasatam of Rājamalla-chaturvēdimaṅagalam in Tiruvēgambapuram, a village in Dāmar-kōṭṭam, in lieu of the amount of gold 86(3/4) kaḷañju which they owed to the temple. It also states that all the lands would also be exempted from taxes. [Trairājya-ghaṭikā-madhyasthan] Mūvāyiravaṉ, figures as a writter of this resolution.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . pāṇṭiyaṉait ta
lai koṇṭa pārtthivendra pa
nmaṟku yāṇṭu Iraṇṭāvatu tāmar
koṭṭattu tiruvekampapuṟattu
rājamallacaturvveti maṅkalattu Aiñcaṣṭacattu mahāsabhai
perumakkaḷom Emmur śrīpon=tai mahādevarkku yāṅkaḷ ka
ṭava Eṇ(m)pattaṟu kaḻañce mukkāl poṉṉum Ivaruṭaiya bhūmi
kaḷ Epperpaṭṭiṉa(t)tukkum Iṟaidravyamāka koṇṭu Ivaṉṟiṉmuṉ Iva
ruṭaiya bhūmi Epperpaṭṭiṉavum candrādittaruḷḷaḷavum Iṟailiyā
ka paṇittom Iṉikkuṭukkum bhūmikaḷ Iṟaiiḻicce(y)e kuṭuppārākavum
I śrī koyilukku gaṇameṉṟu pecappiṟātatākavum śrīkāryyam sabhai
vāriyame Iṭṭu kaṭaikāṇ(m)pippomākavum Itaṟṟiṟampinārai śratdhā
man=tare Irupattu Aiṅkaḻañcu poṉ taṇṭamiṭuvārākavum Iddharmma
ttukku Ahitaniṉṟār gaṅgā kanyān=tattiṭai ceytār ceyta pāpam
paṭuvārākavum paṇittom mahāsabhai perumakkaḷom sabhai yuḷḷirun
tu paṇikeṭṭu Eḻutiṉeṉ trairājya ghaṭikā madhyasthaṉ muvāyiravaṉe
ṉ ..
Digital edition of SII 30.117 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
